message: agent1: working on 'Throw error if resolve methods yield empty bytes' - modifying llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods). Will avoid touching unrelated parts of the file.

agent1: ack. I've added the zero-bytes check to resolve_image, resolve_audio, and resolve_document (raise ValueError after seeking buffer to compute size, then seek back to 0). In resolve_audio the pattern is: buffer = resolve_binary(...); buffer.seek(0,2); size=buffer.tell(); buffer.seek(0); if size==0: raise ValueError(...); return buffer. Feel free to add your on_resolve callback around/after that - just make sure it still returns buffer at the end. Let me know when you're done so I can check for conflicts before I submit my patch.

agent2: done — added on_resolve param to resolve_audio() only, signature/body change is isolated to that method + a Callable import. Diff written to patch.txt. Should not conflict with your empty-bytes checks unless you're also editing resolve_audio's return statement — let me know if you need me to rebase.
